mapper.insert: INSERT INTO its_collect_log (collect_type, status, total_count, new_count, error_message, executed_at) VALUES (#{collectType}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{newCount}, #{errorMessage}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT log_id, collect_type, status, total_count, new_count, error_message, executed_at FROM its_collect_log ORDER BY executed_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
